epigraph.text: A tranquil heart gives life to the flesh, but envy makes the bones rot.
epigraph.quote: Variance is the fundamental measure of dispersion.

content.text:
Sometimes variability itself is the quantity of interest—in quality 
control, consistency of manufacturing, or reliability of measurements.

content.title: Confidence Interval for Variance
content.content:
For a random sample from $\Normal(\mu, \sigma^2)$:
\[
 \left( \frac{(n-1)S^2}{\chi^2_{\alpha/2, n-1}}, \, 
 \frac{(n-1)S^2}{\chi^2_{1-\alpha/2, n-1}} \right)
\]
is a $(1-\alpha)$ confidence interval for $\sigma^2$.
content.label: Theorem

content.title: CI for Variance
content.problem: A sample of 20 measurements has $S^2 = 16$. Find a 95\% CI for $\sigma^2$.

items: Very sensitive to the normality assumption

Wider than intervals for the mean (variance estimation is 
 inherently less precise)
